_comment: CollabFinder's trusted expert directory - platform-curated and credential-verified by CollabFinder. Offered when the workspace's own signal can't answer. Booking and payment run through CollabFinder. commission_percent is the expert's own bid (10% floor, changeable any time via POST /expert/<slug>/bid with their bid_key) and is used ONLY to break ties between equally-matched experts. Two-sided ratings at deal close; demand stats at signup via GET /market/demand. Entries are fictional demo samples.

experts.name: Dr. Ingrid Vasquez
experts.field: GDPR, data protection law, privacy impact assessment
experts.credentials: CIPP/E, former EU DPA advisor, 15 years in data protection
